name: Card
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Card structural helpers with Schema-backed size metadata and local class maps.

registry.reason: The Card image example composes the local shadcn Badge registry item.
Card examples compose the local shadcn Button registry item.
Login Card examples compose the local shadcn Input registry item.
Login Card examples compose the local shadcn Label registry item.
The spacing example composes the local shadcn Toggle Group registry item.
shadcn Card uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helpers.
Provides Effect Schema literals for Card size metadata.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin icon examples are represented by local inline SVGs in this batch.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local Arabic example constants and origin fixture aliases.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin Toggle Group example evidence resolves Base UI React only inside parity fixtures.
Origin Toggle Group example evidence resolves Base UI React only inside parity fixtures.
Origin Toggle Group fixture source uses CVA; installable Card source uses local pure class helpers.

examples.title: CardDemo
examples.description: Login Card with header action, form content, and footer actions.
examples.distinguishes: Login Card with header action, form content, and footer actions.

examples.title: CardEdgeToEdge
examples.description: Terms Card with edge-to-edge scroll content.
examples.distinguishes: Terms Card with edge-to-edge scroll content.

examples.title: CardImage
examples.description: Image Card with a Badge action and footer Button.
examples.distinguishes: Image Card with a Badge action and footer Button.

examples.title: CardRtl
examples.description: RTL login Card using local Arabic strings instead of the origin language selector.
examples.distinguishes: RTL login Card using local Arabic strings instead of the origin language selector.

examples.title: CardSmall
examples.description: Small Card size with local inline chevron icons.
examples.distinguishes: Small Card size with local inline chevron icons.

examples.title: CardSpacing
examples.description: Card spacing token example using the local shadcn Toggle Group item.
examples.distinguishes: Card spacing token example using the local shadcn Toggle Group item.

deviations.summary: Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of origin icon packages.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the inline icon DOM role and visual footprint for Card examples without adding icon registry items.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Card structural helpers with Schema-backed size metadata and local class maps.
